query:
WITH per_entity AS (
            SELECT feature, kind, key, entity_id,
                   SUM(value)::BIGINT AS value,
                   MAX(day) AS last_day
            FROM feature_usage
            WHERE day > CURRENT_DATE - 30
            GROUP BY feature, kind, key, entity_id
        )
        SELECT feature, kind, key,
               COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "entity_count!",
               COALESCE(SUM(value), 0)::BIGINT AS "total_value!",
               COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "median_value!",
               COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY value), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "p90_value!",
               (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_day < CURRENT_DATE - 3))::BIGINT AS "inactive_3d_entity_count!"
        FROM per_entity
        GROUP BY feature, kind, key
